_comment: User-facing roadmap shown in the in-app What's New surface (ADR-0019). status: shipped | in_progress | coming. Keep in sync with docs/adr + the plan.

items.title: AI Council Review
items.summary: Before and after meaningful work, the AI consults a small panel of expert reviewers (2-10, by task size) and synthesizes their feedback — so it doesn't work alone. Ships as a launchable workflow + discipline; a native council engine is a later step.

items.title: Local AI assistant
items.summary: A private, on-device LLM (Ollama) you can chat with about your projects and Synapse itself — off by default.

items.title: Model marketplace
items.summary: Browse + one-click download local models with live streaming progress.

items.title: Voice dictation
items.summary: Dictate into the command pad + the assistant — great on the phone.

items.title: Needs-Review inbox
items.summary: Approve, revise, or reject what your AI workforce hands back — from your desk or your phone.

items.title: Capture button
items.summary: Jot a note (typed or voice) into a project's backlog or its AI memory from anywhere.

items.title: Explain logs with AI
items.summary: Ask the local assistant what a project's errors mean, right from the log viewer.

items.title: Marketplace hub
items.summary: One visual home for tools, models, MCP servers, AI workers, and squads.

items.title: MCP servers for your AI
items.summary: Install MCP servers, see if they're running, launch them, and wire them into your AI automatically.

items.title: Animated launch artwork
items.summary: A living synapse on the boot splash, plus a real Synapse logo + readable dropdowns.

items.title: What's New & Roadmap
items.summary: This page — see what shipped and what's coming, as a path.

items.title: AI workers with personalities
items.summary: Download workers as a role + a personality — two AIs can share a role but differ in personality, so they collaborate and debate.

items.title: AI bundles
items.summary: Install AI-first role, workflow, quick-action, and factory packs from the Marketplace, including bundle overlap readouts and installer-time bundle choices.

items.title: Synapse improves Synapse
items.summary: A bundled Synapse Self workspace, an Improve Synapse quick-action, guarded health/test endpoints, and explicit review/benchmark/record loop scaffolding so Synapse can improve itself through Synapse-native workflows.

items.title: Design harvest workspace
items.summary: A dedicated Web Scraper page for reference capture, provenance/adaptation labeling, component generation, and reference -> generated -> adopted comparison with save-back into project files.

items.title: Token-efficient review loop
items.summary: Targeted UX/QA/token-efficiency/judge passes, quality-loop benchmark specs, and the Synapse UX Lab bundle help spend more tokens only when the risk or benchmark evidence says the escalation is worth it.

items.title: Native multi-AI coordination
items.summary: When two AI coders share one repo, Synapse holds one live picture of who's editing what: a presence registry, advisory file-lane claims with overlap detection, a git collision detector, disk-truth migration/ADR numbering, and a pre-commit gate. Cockpit panel + shared Plan to follow.

items.title: QA & Bug-Hunt agent team
items.summary: A token-efficient bug-finding team: browser-driving agents act like real mobile/desktop users, hunt UI/UX/accessibility bugs, and file screenshot-proof findings as Quality OS gates. Per-role MCP binding + a lean role/persona bundle + a launchable Bug-Hunt Squad shipped; per-worker token accounting + a topology benchmark next.

items.title: Fast Money launcher
items.summary: One click installs the Fast Money AI pack, scaffolds a private/local-first client-ops SaaS starter, and opens a live build session in the generated project.

items.title: Ready-made squad presets
items.summary: Pick a team for a goal — a UI/UX crew, an SEO sweep, a scraping pipeline, a security review — in one tap.

items.title: Publish your own
items.summary: Package + share your own AI bundles, MCP servers, tools, workers, and presets with installer-friendly install choices.

items.title: AI Factory
items.summary: A native Synapse page for recipes, packs, sources, policies, and launch-ready AI case setup.

items.title: AI OS case engine
items.summary: Structured AI cases with mission profiles, isolated worktrees, case-owned jobs, child-case graphs, bundle-aware councils, and a dedicated run board.

items.title: Parallel bakeoffs
items.summary: Benchmark several candidates or related repos at once, compare them, and keep the best path with a written rationale.

items.title: Preview before you build
items.summary: Before a big change, the AI shows a few cheap mockups (e.g. 3 nav-bar options) side by side — you pick, then it builds the one you chose.

items.title: Live web preview
items.summary: See a project with a port rendered in-app, with a screenshot + report-issue button.

items.title: Routines (scheduled agents)
items.summary: Run a squad or the autonomous boss on a schedule.

items.title: Phone push notifications
items.summary: Get pinged on your phone when a worker needs you, a process crashes, or a tunnel changes.

items.title: Per-device access + panic-lock
items.summary: View-only / operator / admin access per paired device, with a one-tap lock-everything.

items.title: Offline voice (Whisper)
items.summary: A downloadable local Whisper model for private, offline speech recognition.
